topics.guiding_question: Tell me about how your pregnancy has been so far.
I am curious what you've been eating during your pregnancy. Tell me about what you ate throughout the day yesterday. What are your thoughts about what you should eat and drink during pregnancy?
What are your thoughts about what you should do for exercise during pregnancy?
Your body changes a lot during pregnancy. What have you noticed changing? How do you feel?
We want to know how to help women be healthy during their pregnancy. What would have helped you to make healthy choices during your pregnancy?
Thank you for taking the time to tell me a little bit about your pregnancy. Is there anything else you think I should know?
